parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your English teacher, Ms Carter, and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Ms Carter
Subject: New school clubs

Dear Class,

Next term the school is starting some new clubs on Wednesday afternoons: a film club, a chess club and a drama club. Which club would you like to join, and why?

We also need ideas for one more club. What do you suggest?

Ms Carter

bullets: say which club you would like to join and why
suggest an idea for one more club
explain why other students would enjoy your idea
ask one question about the clubs
tasks.write: Write your email to Ms Carter.

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: MY FAVOURITE HOBBY
stimulus.body: What do you love doing in your free time? Write an article about your favourite hobby, telling us how you started and why you enjoy it so much. The best articles will be published next month.

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: When Marco checked his bag, he saw that something was missing.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

When Marco checked his bag, he saw that something was missing.
